name: report_name_present
expression: report_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(report_name)) > 0
description: report_name is required for Regulatory Reporting Package extraction.

name: report_type_present
expression: report_type IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(report_type)) > 0
description: report_type is required for Regulatory Reporting Package extraction.

name: reporting_period_end_date_present
expression: reporting_period_end_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(reporting_period_end_date)) > 0
description: reporting_period_end_date is required for Regulatory Reporting Package extraction.
